name: Beef and Scallop Saute
keywords: beef fish easy entertain main dish fish
recipeIngredient: 1 pound beef, cut for stir fry
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a wok or large skillet until almost smoking.
2. Add garlic and cook for about 30 seconds.
3. Add beef, then scallops, and stir-fry for another 30 seconds.
4. Add the remaining ingredients and stir-fry beef and scallops for another 20 to 30 seconds.
